value.body:
## Scope

Move the renderer into a dedicated package under `packages/web`, with clear package boundaries, exports, and dependency ownership.

Include:
- Create the new renderer package structure in `packages/web`.
- Move renderer source, tests, config, and package metadata into the new package.
- Update imports, workspace references, build scripts, and any app/package dependencies that consume the renderer.
- Preserve existing renderer behavior during the migration.

Out of scope:
- Large renderer refactors unrelated to package extraction.
- Product or UI behavior changes.

## Plan

1. Audit current renderer files, consumers, and build/test entry points.
2. Add the new package under `packages/web` and wire it into workspace/package manager config.
3. Move renderer implementation and update internal imports/exports.
4. Update dependent packages and scripts to consume the new package path/name.
5. Remove obsolete paths or compatibility shims once consumers are migrated.

## Verification

- Run package-level typecheck/build for the new renderer package.
- Run affected app/package tests.
- Verify workspace install/build still resolves the renderer package correctly.
- Smoke test the renderer in the desktop/web flow that currently depends on it.

frontmatter.title: Migrate renderer into its own package under packages/web

value.title: Migrate renderer into its own package under packages/web
